title: Seaweed Crusted Cod with Gochujang Brown Rice
description: A quick, earthy, and crunchy Korean-inspired dish featuring steam-cooked cod and a sweet and spicy gochujang sauce. Serve over warm brown rice and garnish with toasted seaweed for added texture.
instructions: Rinse the cod fillets under cold water and pat dry with a paper towel.
In a small bowl, whisk together gochujang, soy sauce, sugar, and sesame oil.
Place the cod fillets in a steamer basket and steam over boiling water for 8-10 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook the brown rice according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, toast the wakame seaweed over medium heat until fragrant.
Once the cod is cooked, brush the gochujang sauce over the top of each fillet.
To serve, place a cod fillet on top of a scoop of warm brown rice and garnish with toasted seaweed and chopped green onions.
Add a few drops of blue food coloring to the gochujang sauce to achieve a deep, earthy color.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
